seo.title: Le p’tit mag — Community grocery in St-Romain (Ayent), Valais
seo.description: Non-profit community grocery in St-Romain (Ayent), Valais. Local and organic products at reseller price, with zero margin. Open Friday and Saturday.
seo.ogAlt: Le p’tit mag, community grocery in St-Romain (Ayent)

home.title: Le p’tit mag : consuming differently, together
home.subtitle: Group orders, reseller price, no margin.
home.objective: Goal: support ethical, local consumption outside a market-driven logic, focusing on short supply chains, transparency and mutual aid.
home.block1_title: A non-profit association shop enabling members to cover their food and household needs:
home.block1_text: From local producers → organic wholesalers → at reseller price, without margin → in a friendly atmosphere.
home.block2_text: Order from home and pick up at our St-Romain location. We chat, play cards and share good moments — it's more than just a pick-up point!
home.block3_text: Rue de l’Église 2, St-Romain (Fri 16:30–18:30, Sat 9:00–12:00) | Call Joël: 078 866 42 43 | info@leptitmag.org
home.how_steps: 1) Test the system. 2) Join the association. 3) Place your order using the order lists. 4) Pick up your purchases at the premises.

how_steps_detail.title: Discover the concept
how_steps_detail.desc: Browse the website to understand how the association works and meet our producers. The full catalogue and prices are accessible once you have a (free) account.

how_steps_detail.title: Sign up for free
how_steps_detail.desc: Register in 30 seconds. Order freely until you join as a member. No commitment, delete your account anytime.

how_steps_detail.title: Order online
how_steps_detail.desc: Log in, add products to your cart and confirm your order. You receive a confirmation email and every step is trackable in your personal account.

how_steps_detail.title: Pick up at the store
how_steps_detail.desc: Come pick up your purchases in St-Romain (Wed, Fri, Sat). We chat, play cards and share good moments — much more than just a pick-up!

home.trial_text: Sign up for free, browse the catalogue and place your orders. If you like it, join the association and pay your contribution. If not, delete your account in one click — no hassle.
home.trial_note: ✓ Free registration  ·  ✓ Full catalogue  ·  ✓ Join whenever you want

membership.title: Membership
membership.intro: By joining the association, you take a step toward food sovereignty and support local production.
membership.regular: Standard contribution: CHF 30.- per month and per adult
membership.statusIntro: After signing up, Joel validates your membership and assigns a status. That status determines catalogue access and how prices are calculated. You will receive an email when your status is activated or updated.
membership.feesIntro: The amounts below are guidelines for Earth status (fair price, no markup). Your contribution is adapted to your situation and recorded in your profile after membership is validated.
membership.regularText: Per adult — Earth status: fair price (no markup) on the catalogue.
membership.softText: Solidarity rate — same Earth status, same access rights.
membership.soft: Reduced contribution: CHF 15.- per month and per adult
membership.charges: Monthly charges are approximately CHF 2000.- (local and order management).

tryCards.title: Learn more
tryCards.text: If you need more information about how Le p’tit mag works, contact us to book a meeting.

tryCards.title: Test
tryCards.text: If you already know enough, create your account and order to see if this alternative distribution system suits you. Contact us if you have questions.

tryCards.title: Join
tryCards.text: Convinced? Join the association by sending us the completed PDF (or via a form). You’ll receive an email from us with the next steps.

membership.seoDescription: Join Le p’tit mag: contributions, how it works, and purpose.

why.sovereigntyText: I help move food out of a purely commercial system and reduce reliance on large retailers.
why.shortCircuitsText: I support local producers and avoid unnecessary transport miles.
why.ethicalText: I access quality products, prioritizing local supply and complementing with organic wholesalers when needed.
why.wasteText: Group orders are pre-assigned: less overstock and fewer losses.
why.fairPriceText: Zero margin: better quality, often comparable prices, while paying producers fairly.
why.transparencyText: Non-profit association: clear operations and explained finances.
why.participationText: Members can suggest producers, share needs, and help (deliveries, shop shifts, etc.).
why.communityText: Build local ties: help each other and enjoy a friendly atmosphere at the shop.

membership.cta_text: Create your account for free, browse the catalogue and place your orders. If it suits you, join the association and pay your contribution. If not, delete your account — no obligation.

producers.title: Producers & suppliers
producers.intro: Our products come primarily from local producers, complemented by organic wholesalers.
producers.seoDescription: Information for producers and suppliers of Le p’tit mag (Ayent).
producers.how1: Contact us via the Contact page (phone or email).
producers.how2: Share product categories, availability, and terms (delivery/pick-up, minimum order).
producers.how3: We will get back to confirm the setup and conditions.
producers.infoText: To be completed: delivery days, logistics constraints, required documents (invoicing, origin, labels).

contact.title: Contact
contact.signal_info: A Signal group exists for members. Leave your phone number if you wish to be added later.
contact.consent: I agree to be contacted via Signal within the context of the association.
contact.seoDescription: Contact Le p’tit mag association (St-Romain, Ayent).
contact.intro: Come during opening hours, call us, or email us.
contact.formNote: The form will come later. For now, contact us by phone or email.

featured.title: ⏳ Ephemeral products
featured.subtitle: Rare products, available for a few days only. Order fast!
featured.login_hint: Create a free account to access the catalogue and place an order.
featured.empty: No ephemeral products right now. Check back soon!
